mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_WMS_WORKREALSTOCK( SDATE, YMDHMS, LOGINID,
ITEMCODE, QTY,
FACTORY, STORAGE ) VALUES ( #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid},
#{itemcode}, #{qty},
#{factory}, #{workshop} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ITEMCODE) FROM T_WMS_LOCATION WHERE USEYN = 'Y') AS TOTALCOUNT FROM T_WMS_LOCATION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.ITEMCODE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY indate desc, ymdhms desc, barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.iid, a.indate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, a.custcode, a.type, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.invoiceno, nvl(a.SOURCE2,'EXCEPTION') AS SOURCE2, a.bdate, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as time FROM t_wms_workinbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY indate desc, ymdhms desc, barcode

SELECT a.iid, a.indate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, a.custcode, a.type, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.invoiceno, nvl(a.SOURCE2,'EXCEPTION') AS SOURCE2, a.qty, a.bdate, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as time FROM t_wms_workinbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
ORDER BY a.indate desc, a.ymdhms desc, a.barcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_workinbound a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_workinbound a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY indate desc, itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.intf_yn, a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, sum(a.qty) as qty FROM t_wms_workinbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY a.intf_yn, a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY indate desc, itemcode

SELECT a.intf_yn, a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, sum(a.qty) as qty FROM t_wms_workinbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY a.intf_yn, a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname ORDER BY indate desc, itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_workinbound a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY a.intf_yn, a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname )

SELECT NVL(SUM(qty), 0) as qty FROM ( SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_workinbound a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY outdate desc, ymdhms desc, barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.iid, a.outdate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.invoiceno, case when a.invoiceno = 'BARCODECOUNT' then 'STOCKCOUNT' ELSE 'EXCEPTION' end as source2, a.bdate, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as time FROM t_wms_workoutbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY outdate desc, ymdhms desc, barcode

SELECT a.iid, a.outdate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.invoiceno, case when a.invoiceno = 'BARCODECOUNT' then 'STOCKCOUNT' ELSE 'EXCEPTION' end as source2, a.bdate, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as time FROM t_wms_workoutbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
ORDER BY a.outdate desc, a.ymdhms desc, a.barcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_workoutbound a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOADEXCEPTION'

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_workoutbound a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOADEXCEPTION'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY outdate desc, itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.intf_yn, a.outdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, sum(a.qty) as qty FROM t_wms_workoutbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY a.intf_yn, a.outdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY outdate desc, itemcode

SELECT a.intf_yn, a.outdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, sum(a.qty) as qty FROM t_wms_workoutbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY a.intf_yn, a.outdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname ORDER BY outdate desc, itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_workoutbound a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY a.intf_yn, a.outdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname )

SELECT NVL(SUM(qty), 0) as qty FROM ( SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_workOutbound a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
)

SELECT a.barcode, a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch as car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) as qty, nvl(a.oldlocation,' ') as oldlocation, a.source, a.rack FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE (a.rack IS NULL or a.rack = '-' OR a.module IS NULL or a.module = '-' OR a.levelcode IS NULL OR a.levelcode = '-' OR a.position IS NULL OR a.position = '-') AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.barcode, a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.source, a.oldlocation, a.rack ORDER BY a.indate desc, a.itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE (a.rack IS NULL or a.rack = '-' OR a.module IS NULL or a.module = '-' OR a.levelcode IS NULL OR a.levelcode = '-' OR a.position IS NULL OR a.position = '-') AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.barcode, a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.source, a.oldlocation, a.rack )

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM ( SELECT SUM(a.qty) as qty FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE (a.rack IS NULL or a.rack = '-' OR a.module IS NULL or a.module = '-' OR a.levelcode IS NULL OR a.levelcode = '-' OR a.position IS NULL OR a.position = '-') AND a.useyn = 'Y'
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.location, a.indate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, CASE WHEN INSTR(a.barcode, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.barcode, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS bdate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC) AS rn FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY itemcode, location

SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.location, a.indate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, CASE WHEN INSTR(a.barcode, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.barcode, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS bdate FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY itemcode, location
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT sum(qty) as qty FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT factory, car, itemcode, itemname, sum(qty) as qty, sum(noqty1) as noqty1, sum(noqty2) as noqty2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, nvl((select sum(qty) from t_wms_workinbound b where a.itemcode = b.itemcode and intf_yn ='N' and useyn = 'Y' and UPPER(b.factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) and a.storage = b.storage and indate >= #{fromDate}),0) as noqty1, nvl((select sum(qty) from t_wms_workoutbound b where a.itemcode = b.itemcode and b.intf_yn ='N' and b.useyn = 'Y' and UPPER(b.factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) and a.storage = b.storage and outdate >= #{fromDate}),0) as noqty2 FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname ) GROUP BY factory, car, itemcode, itemname ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY rn

SELECT factory, car, itemcode, itemname, sum(qty) as qty, sum(noqty1) as noqty1, sum(noqty2) as noqty2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, nvl((select sum(qty) from t_wms_workinbound b where a.itemcode = b.itemcode and intf_yn ='N' and useyn = 'Y' and UPPER(b.factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) and a.storage = b.storage and indate >= #{fromDate}),0) as noqty1, nvl((select sum(qty) from t_wms_workoutbound b where a.itemcode = b.itemcode and b.intf_yn ='N' and b.useyn = 'Y' and UPPER(b.factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) and a.storage = b.storage and outdate >= #{fromDate}),0) as noqty2 FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname ) GROUP BY factory, car, itemcode, itemname ORDER BY itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname )

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM ( SELECT sum(qty) as qty FROM t_wms_worklocation a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
)

select a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, a.qty, a.location, a.barcode, b.itemname, a.itemcode from t_wms_worklocation a left join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode = b.itemcode where a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.indate desc, a.itemcode, a.barcode, a.location

select a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, a.qty, a.location, a.barcode, b.itemname, a.itemcode from t_wms_worklocation a left join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode = b.itemcode where a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.indate desc, a.itemcode, a.barcode, a.location
SELECT COUNT(*) from t_wms_worklocation a where useyn = 'Y'
SELECT SUM(QTY) FROM T_WMS_WORKLOCATION a WHERE USEYN = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.type, a.barcode, a.location, a.lotdate, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.lotdate as bdate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC) AS rn FROM t_wms_workrealstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY ymdhms DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.type, a.barcode, a.location, a.lotdate, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.lotdate as bdate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC) AS rn FROM t_wms_workrealstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
) ORDER BY ymdhms DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sdate desc, itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty,
a.location,
a.intf_yn FROM t_wms_workrealstock a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.location, a.intf_yn ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_workrealstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_workrealstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.location, a.intf_yn )

SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.type, a.barcode, a.location, a.lotdate, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.lotdate as bdate FROM t_wms_workrealstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC

SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty,
a.location,
a.intf_yn FROM t_wms_workrealstock a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.storage, a.scantype, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.location, a.intf_yn ORDER BY a.sdate desc, a.itemcode

SELECT sum(qty) FROM t_wms_workrealstock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT NVL(r.factory, l.factory) AS factory, NVL(r.storage, l.storage) AS storage, NVL(r.itemcode, l.itemcode) AS itemcode, NVL(r.barcode, l.barcode) AS barcode, r.location AS rlocation, l.location AS llocation, CASE WHEN r.location = l.location THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS difflocation, NVL(r.qty, 0) AS rqty, NVL(l.qty, 0) AS lqty, NVL(r.qty, 0) - NVL(l.qty, 0) AS diffqty FROM (SELECT sdate, barcode, qty, loginid, itemcode, location, factory, storage FROM t_wms_workrealstock WHERE useyn = 'Y'
AND upper(factory) = upper(#{factory})
AND upper(storage) = upper(#{storage})
AND sdate = #{startdate}
AND UPPER(itemcode) LIKE '%' || #{itemcode} || '%' ) r FULL JOIN (SELECT indate, barcode, qty, loginid, itemcode, location, factory, storage FROM t_wms_worklocation WHERE (useyn = 'Y' OR YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND upper(factory) = upper(#{factory})
AND upper(storage) = upper(#{storage})
AND indate <= #{startdate}
AND UPPER(itemcode) LIKE '%' || #{itemcode} || '%'
AND UPPER(rack) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{rack}) || '%' ) l ON r.factory = l.factory AND r.storage = l.storage AND r.itemcode = l.itemcode AND r.barcode = l.barcode ORDER BY difflocation, diffqty,llocation

SELECT NVL(r.factory, l.factory) AS factory, NVL(r.storage, l.storage) AS storage, NVL(r.itemcode, l.itemcode) AS itemcode, NVL(r.barcode, l.barcode) AS barcode, r.location AS rlocation, l.location AS llocation, CASE WHEN r.location = l.location THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS difflocation, NVL(r.qty, 0) AS rqty, NVL(l.qty, 0) AS lqty, NVL(r.qty, 0) - NVL(l.qty, 0) AS diffqty FROM (SELECT sdate, barcode, qty, loginid, itemcode, location, factory, storage FROM t_wms_workrealstock WHERE useyn = 'Y'
AND upper(factory) = upper(#{factory})
AND upper(storage) = upper(#{storage})
AND sdate = #{startdate}
AND UPPER(itemcode) LIKE '%' || #{itemcode} || '%' ) r FULL JOIN (SELECT indate, barcode, qty, loginid, itemcode, location, factory, storage FROM t_wms_worklocation WHERE (useyn = 'Y' OR YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND upper(factory) = upper(#{factory})
AND upper(storage) = upper(#{storage})
AND indate <= #{startdate}
AND UPPER(itemcode) LIKE '%' || #{itemcode} || '%'
AND UPPER(rack) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{rack}) || '%' ) l ON r.factory = l.factory AND r.storage = l.storage AND r.itemcode = l.itemcode AND r.barcode = l.barcode ORDER BY difflocation, diffqty,llocation

SELECT SDATE, LOCATION, BARCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY AS realqty, '0' AS systemqty FROM ( SELECT R.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY LOCATION, BARCODE ORDER BY SDATE ) AS RN FROM T_WMS_WORKREALSTOCK R
WHERE TRIM(SDATE) = #{sdate} AND USEYN = 'Y'
AND UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(itemcode) = UPPER(#{itemcode})
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND location = #{location} ) X
UNION ALL
SELECT indate, location, barcode, itemcode, '0' AS realqty, qty AS systemqty FROM t_wms_worklocation
WHERE TRIM(indate) = #{sdate} AND useyn = 'N'
AND UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(itemcode) = UPPER(#{itemcode})
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND memo_d = 'CHANGE'
AND SUBSTR(TRIM(ymdhms_d), 1, 8) = REPLACE(#{sdate}, '-', '') AND location = #{location}
ORDER BY location

SELECT t.*, CASE WHEN rns.barcode IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag, CASE WHEN t.useyn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag2,
(SELECT 'SENDING' FROM T_WMS_FACTORYMOVE F WHERE F.BARCODE = T.BARCODE AND f.Sdate BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - 7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND #{startdate} AND SOURCE = 'SENDING' AND USEYN = 'Y' ) AS SENDING,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.location, t.itemcode, t.barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT l.indate, l.factory, l.storage, l.location, l.barcode, l.itemcode, l.qty, i.itemname, l.useyn FROM t_wms_worklocation l LEFT JOIN t_wms_workrealstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
LEFT JOIN t_mi_item i ON i.itemcode = l.itemcode WHERE (l.useyn = 'Y' OR l.YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND r.location IS NULL ) t LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstocknotscan rns ON rns.barcode = t.barcode AND rns.sdate = #{startdate} ORDER BY t.location, t.itemcode, t.barcode

SELECT t.*, CASE WHEN rns.barcode IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag, CASE WHEN t.useyn = 'Y' THEN '1' ELSE 'complete' END AS flag2,
(SELECT 'SENDING' FROM T_WMS_FACTORYMOVE F WHERE F.BARCODE = T.BARCODE AND f.Sdate BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - 7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND #{startdate}
AND SOURCE = 'SENDING' AND USEYN = 'Y' ) AS SENDING, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.location, t.itemcode, t.barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT l.indate, l.factory, l.storage, l.location, l.barcode, l.itemcode, l.qty, i.itemname, l.useyn FROM t_wms_worklocation l LEFT JOIN t_wms_workrealstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
LEFT JOIN t_mi_item i ON i.itemcode = l.itemcode WHERE (l.useyn = 'Y' OR l.YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND r.location IS NULL ) t LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstocknotscan rns ON rns.barcode = t.barcode AND rns.sdate = #{startdate} ORDER BY t.location, t.itemcode, t.barcode

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT l.indate, l.location, l.barcode, l.itemcode, l.qty FROM t_wms_worklocation l LEFT JOIN t_wms_workrealstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
WHERE (l.useyn = 'Y' OR l.YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND r.location IS NULL ORDER BY location ) t

SELECT nvl(sum(l.qty),0) FROM t_wms_worklocation l LEFT JOIN t_wms_workrealstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
WHERE (l.useyn = 'Y' OR l.YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND r.location IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO t_wms_realstocknotscan (sdate, factory, storage, barcode, itemcode, qty, loginid, ymdhms) VALUES (#{vo.date}, #{vo.factory}, #{vo.storage}, #{vo.barcode}, #{vo.itemcode}, #{vo.qty}, #{vo.loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY FACTORY,STORAGE,CAR,ITEMCODE) AS rn FROM ( SELECT #{sdate} as sdate, FACTORY, STORAGE, CAR, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME, SUM(REALSTOCK_QTY) AS countqty, SUM( NVL(BACKUP_QTY,0)-NVL(REALSTOCK_QTY,0)) AS stockqty, --SUM(BACKUP_QTY) AS MAGAM_QTY, --SUM(COUNT_QTY) AS COUNT_QTY, --SUM(STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY, SUM(NOSCAN_QTY) AS noscanqty, SUM(COUNT_QTY) + SUM(STOCK_QTY) + SUM(NOSCAN_QTY) AS totalqty FROM ( ----------------------------------------------------------------- -- 1) LOCATIONBACKUP 기준 수불/재고실사 ----------------------------------------------------------------- SELECT a.factory ,CASE WHEN UPPER(a.storage) IN ('MATERIAL','SIDE SEAT','OUTSIDE') THEN 'Material' ELSE a.storage END AS storage , c.subname_ch AS car , a.itemcode , b.itemname ,(SELECT SUM(QTY) FROM (SELECT AA.BARCODE, AA.QTY FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK AA WHERE AA.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND AA.FACTORY = A.FACTORY AND AA.STORAGE = A.STORAGE AND A.INDATE = AA.SDATE GROUP BY AA.BARCODE, AA.QTY )) AS REALSTOCK_QTY ,SUM(TO_NUMBER(a.qty)) AS BACKUP_qty ,SUM(CASE WHEN a.source IN ('BARCODECOUNT', 'LOCATIONCOUNT') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END) AS count_qty ,SUM(CASE WHEN a.source NOT IN ('BARCODECOUNT', 'LOCATIONCOUNT') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END) AS stock_qty , CAST(0 AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS noscan_qty , CAST(SUM(a.qty) AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS qty FROM t_wms_locationbackup a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(a.factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(a.storage) IN
UPPER(#{s})
AND SUBSTR(a.backup_date,1,10) = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('2025-10-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY a.factory, a.storage, a.indate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname
UNION ALL
----------------------------------------------------------------- -- 2) 실재고와 매칭 안 된 스캔 누락 데이터 ----------------------------------------------------------------- SELECT l.factory ,CASE WHEN UPPER(l.storage) IN ('MATERIAL','SIDE SEAT','OUTSIDE') THEN 'Material' ELSE l.storage END AS storage , c.subname_ch AS car , l.itemcode , i.itemname ,0 ,0 , CAST(0 AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS count_qty , CAST(0 AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS stock_qty , CAST(SUM(l.qty) AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS noscan_qty , CAST(0 AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS qty FROM t_wms_worklocation l LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON l.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN t_mi_item i ON i.itemcode = l.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_wms_workrealstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode AND UPPER(r.factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) AND UPPER(r.storage) IN
UPPER(#{s})
AND r.sdate = #{sdate} LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstocknotscan rns ON rns.barcode = l.barcode WHERE l.useyn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(r.factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(l.storage) IN
UPPER(#{s})
AND l.indate <= #{sdate} AND r.location IS NULL AND rns.barcode IS NULL -- FLAG = 0 조건 대체 GROUP BY l.factory, l.storage, c.subname_ch, l.itemcode, i.itemname ) where 1=1
GROUP BY FACTORY, STORAGE, CAR, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME ) t ) ORDER BY FACTORY,STORAGE,CAR,ITEMCODE

SELECT #{sdate} as sdate, FACTORY, STORAGE, CAR, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME, SUM(REALSTOCK_QTY) AS countqty, SUM( NVL(BACKUP_QTY,0)-NVL(REALSTOCK_QTY,0)) AS stockqty, --SUM(BACKUP_QTY) AS MAGAM_QTY, --SUM(COUNT_QTY) AS COUNT_QTY, --SUM(STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY, SUM(NOSCAN_QTY) AS noscanqty, SUM(COUNT_QTY) + SUM(STOCK_QTY) + SUM(NOSCAN_QTY) AS totalqty FROM ( ----------------------------------------------------------------- -- 1) LOCATIONBACKUP 기준 수불/재고실사 ----------------------------------------------------------------- SELECT a.factory ,CASE WHEN UPPER(a.storage) IN ('MATERIAL','SIDE SEAT','OUTSIDE') THEN 'Material' ELSE a.storage END AS storage , c.subname_ch AS car , a.itemcode , b.itemname ,(SELECT SUM(QTY) FROM (SELECT AA.BARCODE, AA.QTY FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK AA WHERE AA.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE AND AA.FACTORY = A.FACTORY AND AA.STORAGE = A.STORAGE AND A.INDATE = AA.SDATE GROUP BY AA.BARCODE, AA.QTY )) AS REALSTOCK_QTY ,SUM(TO_NUMBER(a.qty)) AS BACKUP_qty ,SUM(CASE WHEN a.source IN ('BARCODECOUNT', 'LOCATIONCOUNT') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END) AS count_qty ,SUM(CASE WHEN a.source NOT IN ('BARCODECOUNT', 'LOCATIONCOUNT') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END) AS stock_qty , CAST(0 AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS noscan_qty , CAST(SUM(a.qty) AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS qty FROM t_wms_locationbackup a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(a.factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(a.storage) IN
UPPER(#{s})
AND SUBSTR(a.backup_date,1,10) = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE('2025-10-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY a.factory, a.storage, a.indate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname
UNION ALL
----------------------------------------------------------------- -- 2) 실재고와 매칭 안 된 스캔 누락 데이터 ----------------------------------------------------------------- SELECT l.factory ,CASE WHEN UPPER(l.storage) IN ('MATERIAL','SIDE SEAT','OUTSIDE') THEN 'Material' ELSE l.storage END AS storage , c.subname_ch AS car , l.itemcode , i.itemname ,0 ,0 , CAST(0 AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS count_qty , CAST(0 AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS stock_qty , CAST(SUM(l.qty) AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS noscan_qty , CAST(0 AS NUMBER(18,2)) AS qty FROM t_wms_worklocation l LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON l.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN t_mi_item i ON i.itemcode = l.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_wms_workrealstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode AND UPPER(r.factory) = UPPER(#{factory}) AND UPPER(r.storage) IN
UPPER(#{s})
AND r.sdate = #{sdate} LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstocknotscan rns ON rns.barcode = l.barcode WHERE l.useyn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(r.factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(l.storage) IN
UPPER(#{s})
AND l.indate <= #{sdate} AND r.location IS NULL AND rns.barcode IS NULL -- FLAG = 0 조건 대체 GROUP BY l.factory, l.storage, c.subname_ch, l.itemcode, i.itemname ) where 1=1
GROUP BY FACTORY, STORAGE, CAR, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME ORDER BY FACTORY,STORAGE,CAR,ITEMCODE

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.WMS_KEY, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.OKYN, A.QTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END AS OKQTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, 0) ELSE 0 END AS NGQTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS TIME, D.LINENO, D.WORKPLACE, D.SHIFT, A.BARCODE,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY , 0)) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_WORK A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE D ON D.BARCODE = A.BARCODE AND D.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(a.qty) as qty, SUM(CASE WHEN a.okyn = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END) AS okqty, SUM(CASE WHEN a.okyn = 'N' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END) AS ngqty, D.LINENO, D.WORKPLACE, D.SHIFT FROM T_WMS_WORK A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE D ON D.BARCODE = A.BARCODE AND D.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, D.LINENO, D.WORKPLACE, D.SHIFT ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.WMS_KEY, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN A.QTY ELSE 0 END AS OKQTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN A.QTY ELSE 0 END AS NGQTY, D.LINENO, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS TIME, A.BARCODE,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_SEMIWORK A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE D ON D.BARCODE = A.BARCODE AND D.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(a.qty) as qty, SUM(CASE WHEN a.okyn = 'Y' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END) AS okqty, SUM(CASE WHEN a.okyn = 'N' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END) AS ngqty FROM T_WMS_SEMIWORK A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE D ON D.BARCODE = A.BARCODE AND D.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC, ITEMCODE
